title: Mini article: food habits
subtitle: Talk about food culture simply.
overview: Use soler, normalmente, and comparison language.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: It is different from my country.

items.es: En algunos países, la gente suele cenar más tarde.
items.en: In some countries, people usually eat dinner later.

items.es: Para mí, esta costumbre es interesante.
items.en: For me, this custom is interesting.

items.es: En mi casa normalmente cenamos temprano.
items.en: In my house we normally eat dinner early.

items.es: Me gusta probar comida local cuando viajo.
items.en: I like trying local food when I travel.

items.es: Creo que la comida dice mucho sobre una cultura.
items.en: I think food says a lot about a culture.
